title: Cristiano Ronaldo CR7 Mod
description: Are you also a fan of this man who looks like a machine? Cristiano Ronaldo is one of the greatest players in history and you can now play with him.
body:
Are you also a fan of this man who looks like a machine? Cristiano Ronaldo is one of the greatest players in history and you can now play with him.

Here you can find CR7 in different eras in his memorable spells at Manchester United, Real Madrid, Juventus and Al Nassr. We also have his legendary one that terrified several FIFA players, CR7 with a machete, and also the robot version itself.
